posts.text:
FBI Director Kash Patel says the bureau has stopped multiple terror plots, warning the threat remains high and failures to remove known extremists during the prior administration can have deadly consequences:

“We had a record-setting year because we had 34,000 violent offenders to arrest, because the prior administration flooded America’s streets with criminals—violent criminals. And what we need to focus on is how we stop terrorist attacks like we did. This FBI stopped four attacks in this pas

Ted Cruz calls for forcing Democrats into a talking filibuster on the Save America Act, arguing voter ID and proof of citizenship are simple, common-sense protections for elections:

"Listen, I think we should do everything humanly possible to pass the Save America Act. I think we should use every procedural tool. I think that we should force the Democrats to do a talking filibuster. Right now, when the Democrats filibuster a bill, they don’t do what has been the way the Senate has operated for

Sen. Fetterman says he’s standing alone in his party backing President Trump’s “Epic Fury,” vowing to support Israel and what he calls moral clarity over political pressure:

“I am the only Democrat that is absolutely fully supportive of what the president has done with Epic Fury, and that’s isolated me in my party. But for me, generation after generation, we are losing support in my party for Israel and really the nation there—the only nation in the region that has the kind of values that we as

“My heart stopped.”

John Fetterman reflects on the severity of his stroke and the recovery that followed.

Full episode available now on YouTube and Spotify.

WATCH HERE ➡️ piped.video/Nk8D6rXMvGA?si=nVqT…
